summary: Completed e2e testing of Measurement Configuration feature. All features working correctly: Admin can add product types, toggle measurement selections with visual feedback (checkmarks), and save changes. Order Portal dynamically filters measurement fields based on selected products.
seed_data_creation: Reset Jacket product type to default 5 measurements (was incorrectly showing 9 due to previous test data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All measurement configuration features tested and working: 1) Admin MeasurementConfigPage (/admin/measurements) - 'Add Product Type' button creates new product type with toast notification, measurement badges can be toggled (golden with checkmark = selected, gray = not selected), 'Save Changes' persists configuration. 2) Order Portal MeasurementDetailsPage (/reseller/measurement/details) - dynamically filters visible measurements based on selected products using measurement_ids from product_types config. 3) Verified: Jacket shows 5 measurements (BICEPS, CHEST, JACKET LENGTH, SHOULDERS, SLEEVE LENGTH), Pant shows 2 measurements (HIPS, WAIST), Jacket+Pant combined shows 7 unique measurements.

admin_add_product_type.details: 'Add Product Type' button creates new product type with toast 'Product type added! Configure its measurements below.'

admin_toggle_measurements.details: Clicking measurement badges toggles selection - golden background with checkmark = selected, gray = not selected

admin_save_changes.details: 'Save Changes' button persists configuration with toast 'Configuration saved!'

order_portal_dynamic_measurements_jacket.details: Jacket selected shows exactly 5 measurements: BICEPS, CHEST, JACKET LENGTH, SHOULDERS, SLEEVE LENGTH

order_portal_dynamic_measurements_pant.details: Pant selected shows exactly 2 measurements: HIPS, WAIST

order_portal_combined_products.details: Jacket + Pant selected shows 7 unique measurements (union of both product types)

api_get_measurements_config.details: GET /api/measurements/config returns fields and product_types with measurement_ids
